rationale: The two papers have only partial methodological overlap (both use Bayesian latent-variable machinery and ordered-probit style treatment of measured ratings), but their core aims differ substantially: SRTM topic-role inference versus causal mediation identification via conditional independence Bayes factors. The matched evidence is just a DOI-level reference with no local citation context or quoted passage, so there is not enough evidence to confidently classify this as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
